query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_agentes FROM agentes; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_certs FROM certificacoes; SELECT COUNT(*) as agentes_sem_cert FROM agentes a WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM certificacoes c WHERE UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) = UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ)));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_agentes FROM agentes; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_certs FROM certificacoes; SELECT COUNT(*) as agentes_sem_cert FROM agentes a WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM certificacoes c WHERE UPPER(TRIM(c.chaveJ)) = UPPER(TRIM(a.chaveJ)));
